race.description: Scope Building Nt Queen Of The Desert Hcp
race.comment: Good race for the mares. LUCKY FORTUNA (4) was a winner five back then placed all four since. Has been racing over a little further but looks well placed here and will be strong late. Expected to go close. FAST FREEZE (5) was good fresh then too bad to be true last time. Got back in a race behind Hebel and there was a few horses in that race that just never got into it. Well worth another chance. DOLCE D'AMOUR (8) was good two back then worked hard and weakened late last time. Much better draw this time and expected to take catching. DEMIQUAVER (2) was prominent from the outset when fifth over 1200m at this track last time out. Strike rate this course and distance is impressive. Expected to be in the finish. PRINCESS PANCAKES (1) can sneak into the finish if runs up to best form.
